name: Spec or docs issue
about: Report a problem or inconsistency in the specification or documentation

## Problem
Describe the issue clearly.

## Affected area
- [ ] README
- [ ] SPEC
- [ ] schema
- [ ] roadmap
- [ ] examples
- [ ] fixtures
- [ ] docs

## Why it matters
Explain the impact.

## Suggested fix
If you have one, describe it.
